data.title: Smart money poised for re-entry as Binance crypto reserves plummet and stablecoins grow

data.title: AI experts jump ship from Musk’s Tesla to new robotics startup
data.description:
Tesla has lost at least ten of its long-term, experienced engineers to a new robotics startup called Sunday Robotics. Sunday Robotics recently unveiled its product called Memo, along with a team consisting of engineers who previously worked on various Tesla AI products. Tesla loses employees to a new robotics startup A new robotics startup called […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ai-experts-from-tesla-to-robotics-startup/

data.title: South Korea Expands Crypto Travel Rule to All Transactions in Major AML Crackdown
data.description:

source: https://www.ethnews.com/south-korea-expands-crypto-travel-rule-to-all-transactions-in-major-aml-crackdown/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 91,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.64% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 29, 2025, 15:22 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 91,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 91,032.90625 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.64% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $159 Million in Liquidations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market saw liquidations totaling $159 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $121 million, while short positions made up $38.15 million.

During this period, a total of 84,258 traders were liquidated globally. The largest single liquidation occurred on OKX's BTC-USDT-SWAP, valued at $2.3577 million.

data.title: Bitcoin NPRL Returns To Neutral As Market Sits In Equilibrium – What This Means For Price
data.description:
Blockchain analytics platform XWIN Research Japan shares that Bitcoin’s NPRL has returned to a neutral zone following a period of significant volatility. This development represents one of many positives following Bitcoin’s modest price gain over the last week. Related Reading: Newbie Bitcoin Whales Capitulating, But Old Hands Stay Silent NPRL Shows Balanced Market, New Trend Forms On Horizon The Net Realized Profit and Loss (NRPL) is an on-chain metric that measures the total profit or loss that Bitcoin holders realize when they sell their coins at a given price. A positive NRPL suggests more BTC are being sold at a profit rather than at a loss, i
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-nprl-returns-to-neutral-as-market-sits-in-equilibrium-what-this-means-for-price/

data.title: UK Budget Confirms New Crypto Reporting Rules from January 1
data.description:

data.title: China central bank declares crypto illegal and warns on stablecoins
data.description:
China’s central bank has reiterated its hardline stance against cryptocurrencies and stablecoins, declaring that all “virtual assets” lack legal status.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-central-bank-declares-crypto-illegal/

data.title: Indian police issue warnings over wedding invitation phishing links
data.description:
The Indian police have issued warnings about a scam that has been ongoing across the country. According to reports, criminals have figured out another clever way to steal money from unsuspecting users this festive season. They claimed that the bad actors are now exploiting the wedding season to dupe innocent victims on WhatsApp. According to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/indian-police-warn-wedding-phishing-links/
